title: ProjectPropertiesGUI
description:
ProjectPropertiesGUI

Project: Properties: GUI Builder Page

On this page, you can specify the startup form for GUI Builder and also set the value of the help file used in your project.

Item	Description

Startup
		 Form	Select
		 the startup form for the current project. If no forms have been
		 created in GUI Builder, then there will be no forms in the list.

Help
		 File	Set help
		 file that will be used by forms in GUI Builder.
